summary: VFans Media Multi-File Upload Testing - Iteration 2. All backend tests passed (10/10). Frontend verified: multi-file upload UI with limits, min price $5.99 validation, blur level selector, Copy button with toast, public link page with blurred preview and file tags. One note: Copy button shows error in Playwright due to clipboard permissions but code implementation is correct.
critical_code_review_comments: Demo user login triggers /api/demo/reset which deletes all org/creator data - intentional but affects testing persistence
Copy button implementation is correct with toast notifications for success/failure
Upload endpoint correctly uses Form() params for creator_id and blur_level
Static files correctly served at /api/uploads/ prefix

test_credentials.note: Demo user resets all data on each login - by design

seed_data_creation: premium-photos link with real uploaded image exists (created by main agent). Demo user data resets on each login.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests: /app/backend/tests/test_vfans_multi_upload.py covers upload with Form() params, files array, static file serving. IMPORTANT: Demo user (demo@vfans.com) calls /api/demo/reset on login which deletes org/creators. For persistent test data, use premium-photos link which was created with a different user context. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_vfans_complete.py may need to create fresh test data each run or use non-demo user.

backend_endpoints_tested: GET /api/links/by-slug/premium-photos - files array and preview_url verified
frontend_pages_tested: /l/premium-photos - blurred preview, 1 image tag, 44.4 KB size, creator info, price $9.99
/creator/{id}/links - Copy button, View button, Deactivate button visible
/creator/{id}/links/create - multi-file upload (10 img/3 vid/10 total), min $5.99 validation, blur level selector
ui_elements_verified: Upload zone with 'Up to 10 images or 3 videos (max 10 total)' text
Red validation message 'Minimum price is $5.99' when below minimum
Blur Level dropdown with options: blur, low, medium, high, extreme
View button that opens public link
Blurred preview image on public link page
'1 image' and '44.4 KB' file info tags

multi_file_upload.details: Upload zone shows correct limits, validates max files

blurred_preview.details: Preview image visible on /l/premium-photos with blue blurred pattern

min_price_validation.details: Label shows 'min $5.99', red error when below minimum

copy_link_button.details: Button exists with icon, triggers toast (error in Playwright due to clipboard permissions, but code is correct)

files_array.details: API correctly stores and returns files array with url, type, preview_url, name, size

static_file_serving.details: Files served at /api/uploads/ prefix, verified with HTTP 200 response
